items.title: EXI: Industrials Dashboard For August
items.description: EXI offers global exposure and less concentration risk than XLI but underperformed. Check out the analysis of the industrial sector here.

items.title: Airbus Is About to Eclipse a Record That Boeing Held for Decades
items.description: It’s taken the better part of four decades, but Airbus has finally caught up: The A320 series is poised to overtake its US competitor as the most-delivered commercial airliner in history, according to aviation consultancy Cirium.  As of early August, Airbus had winnowed the gap to just 20 units, with 12,155 lifetime A320-family shipments, according to the data.  “Did anyone back then expect it could become number one – and on such high production volumes?” Max Kingsley-Jones, head of advisory at Cirium Ascend, wrote of the A320 in a recent social-media post.
